top.title: Earthset and a solar eclipse: Nasa releases first images from Moon fly-by

top.title: Chilean woman accused of Pinochet-era kidnaps loses Australia extradition battle
top.summary: Adriana Rivas moved from Chile to Australia in the 1970s, working there as a nanny and cleaner.

top.title: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
top.summary: The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.

top.title: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
top.summary: Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.

top.title: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
top.summary: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.
